data_description.name: Display name for this sensor in Home Assistant.
data_description.url: Base URL of your Owncast server, e.g. https://live.example.com
data_description.timeout: Optional. HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 10).
data_description.verify_ssl: Optional. Disable if your server uses a self-signed certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Owncast server.
error.invalid_url: URL must use http or https.

abort.already_configured: This Owncast server is already configured.
